title: Wall of Manifestation | Dubai #vastu #manifestation
description:
Ever wondered how the layout of your home or workplace could impact your health, wealth, and success? Join us on The Rich Podcast as we dive deep into the mystical world of Vastu Shastra with none other than the esteemed Acharya Pankit Goyal, renowned for his impeccable track record as the highest charging Vastu consultant.

In this captivating episode, Acharya Pankit shares his journey from a failed business venture to becoming a beacon of authenticity in the realm of Vastu consultations. Discover the profound significance of different directions, learn the secrets behind renowned companies like Google and Amazon, and unravel the mysteries behind iconic structures such as Dubai's Science Museum and Buckingham Palace.

Curious about manifestation techniques and how to attract wealth? Acharya Pankit reveals the best direction for manifestation and shares some fascinating insights into the Vastu issues of countries like Pakistan and Sri Lanka.

But that's not all! We'll also expose common scams perpetrated by astrologers and Vastu consultants, ensuring you steer clear of pitfalls and make informed decisions.

Don't miss out on this enlightening conversation! Hit that subscribe button and share this video with your friends to spread the wisdom. And remember, you can catch this podcast on Spotify for on-the-go listening. Tune in now and transform your life with Vastu wisdom! ✨
